[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111101 5
1 0101000 2
2 0101000 2
3 0000110 2
4 1011111 6
5 1011000 3
6 0010011 3
7 0110010 3

01 0101000 2 match 1 2
12 0000000 a

34 1001000 2
45 0000001 1
56 0100010 2
67 0010101 3
70 0000000 a

71 0101000 2 match 1 2
